tweets.content: RT by @elonmusk: The strange thing about progress is that it only counts if you ignore where we started. Every civilisation practised slavery. The civilisation that ended it is now told it should feel guilty forever for having once participated. How does that make any sense?
tweets.translated: RT @elonmusk：关于进步的奇怪之处在于，只有忽略我们的起点，它才算数。每个文明都实行奴隶制。结束它的文明现在被告知它应该为曾经的参与而永远感到内疚。这有什么意义呢？

tweets.content: RT by @elonmusk: I’m reading an old collection of interconnected science fiction stories by Jerry Pournelle, written in the early 70s. His best books were later co-authored with Larry Niven, but it is still solid work in my favored “competence porn” genre, with entrepreneurs as protagonists. It stands out to me that he was despairing for America when he wrote the stories. Things looked bad at the time, and his fiction projected it into the future. Social unrest, Vietnam, Watergate, economic recession, energy crisis, and for a patriotic space guy, abandoning Apollo. The backdrop for the stories was that America was unfixable, which is, of course, a motivation to go to space in fiction, but I do think he was genuinely worried by what he saw around him. But over the next decade, things got better, and Jerry had a front row seat for the rise of the technology sector, writing the Chaos Manor column in Byte magazine for many years. He also got to see the founding of SpaceX, a company straight out of a hard SF novel, and they re-flew a landed rocket shortly before he died. Trends aren’t fate. Bad situations can be fixed, and good ones still need to be defended. RIP Jerry, I’m glad you got to see things turn around. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jerry_Pournelle
tweets.translated: RT @elonmusk：我正在读 Jerry Pournelle 写于 70 年代初期的一本古老的相互关联的科幻故事集。他最好的书后来与拉里·尼文（Larry Niven）合着，但在我最喜欢的以企业家为主角的“能力色情”类型中，这仍然是一部扎实的作品。在我看来，当他写这些故事时，他对美国感到绝望。当时的情况看起来很糟糕，他的小说将其投射到了未来。社会动荡、越南、水门事件、经济衰退、能源危机，以及一个爱国的太空人放弃阿波罗。这些故事的背景是美国无法修复，这当然是小说中前往太空的动机，但我确实认为他确实对周围所见感到担忧。但在接下来的十年里，情况有所好转，杰里在科技行业的崛起中占据了前排位置，多年来在《字节》杂志上撰写了《混沌庄园》专栏。他还见证了 SpaceX 的成立，这是一家直接从硬科幻小说中走出来的公司，在他去世前不久，他们重新发射了一枚着陆火箭。趋势不是命运。坏的情况可以解决，好的情况仍然需要捍卫。安息吧，杰瑞，我很高兴你看到事情有好转。 https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jerry_Pournelle

tweets.content: Pinned: POLL: ICE has been abused by the Fake News Media at levels never seen before. They are Great Patriots who work hard, and do a fantastic job in a very hostile environment. Much of this hostility is caused by the Dumocrats and the Fake News. The concept I have had for quite some time — A strong feeling that the name of these Patriots, “ICE,” should be changed to, “NICE,” in that it will totally discombobulate Crooked, Dishonest, and Unpatriotic Reporters and Journalists. For them to say, “We went to a NICE Facility today,” as opposed to “ICE” or, “NICE Agents have deported a Violent Drug Dealer,” they won’t be able to handle it, they will go totally crazy! All it means is adding an “N” (“National”) to “ICE (“Immigration and Customs Enforcement”) — A much more prestigious name. Everyone loves it, but I have been told by the legendary Tom Homan that the Agents do not love it as much as the other population. Who thinks that we should add an “N” to change the name of “ICE” to “NICE?”   Thank you for your attention to this matter! President DJT
tweets.translated: 已固定：民意调查：假新闻媒体对 ICE 的滥用达到了前所未有的程度。他们是伟大的爱国者，他们努力工作，在非常恶劣的环境中做得非常出色。这种敌意很大程度上是由杜民主派和假新闻引起的。我有一段时间一直有这样的想法——一种强烈的感觉，这些爱国者的名字“ICE”应该改为“NICE”，因为这将彻底扰乱不诚实、不诚实、不爱国的记者和记者。对于他们来说，“我们今天去了一家 NICE 设施”，而不是“ICE”或“NICE 特工驱逐了一名暴力毒贩”，他们将无法处理，他们会完全疯掉！这意味着在“ICE”（“移民和海关执法局”）中添加一个“N”（“国家”）——一个更有声望的名字。每个人都喜欢它，但传奇人物汤姆·霍曼告诉我，特工们并不像其他人那样喜欢它。谁认为我们应该添加一个“N”来将“ICE”的名字改为“NICE”？   感谢您对此事的关注！总裁DJT

tweets.content: Fun new information discovery from Poet OSINT community: Seems likely that $POET / $SIVE are going to power a Top-3 hyperscaler (either Amazon, Microsoft, Google). Given a Linkedin update from Ankur Singla (CEO of Lumilens). Who stated their customer is one of the top 3 hyperscalers with their post focusing on CPO/NPO. With that clue, seems more likely the Sivers CW DFB light source path over other EML suppliers given it's CPO Scale Out/NPO. If you don't remember, Sivers is the laser supplier to Poet. And Poet has purchase agreements with Lumilens. Always fun to find major potential breadcrumbs in the wild before they're officially confirmed. (Disclosure, long Sive)
tweets.translated: Poet OSINT 社区有趣的新信息发现：$POET / $SIVE 很可能将为前 3 名超大规模提供商（亚马逊、微软、谷歌）提供支持。 Ankur Singla（Lumilens 首席执行官）在 Linkedin 上发布了最新消息。谁表示他们的客户是三大超大规模提供商之一，他们的帖子重点关注 CPO/NPO。有了这个线索，考虑到 Sivers CW DFB 光源路径是 CPO 横向扩展/NPO，它似乎比其他 EML 供应商更有可能。如果您不记得，Sivers 是 Poet 的激光供应商。 Poet 与 Lumilens 签订了购买协议。在正式确认之前，在野外找到主要的潜在面包屑总是很有趣的。 （披露，长西夫）

tweets.content: OpenLight (private) seems to get bigger and bigger every time I look at it. If you’re curious about their public ecosystem outside of Advantest: $JBL ( $SIVE partner ) for scaling PICs $MRVL and $MXL for DSPs $TSEM for the foundry. $300394.SZ / TFC Optical (OSAT/subassembly) Can often get exposure into private growth through public equities if you’re not an accredited investor. Since optical players look very interconnected.
tweets.translated: 每次我看 OpenLight (private) 时，它似乎都变得越来越大。如果您对 Advantest 之外的公共生态系统感到好奇：用于扩展 PIC 的 $JBL（$SIVE 合作伙伴），用于 DSP 的 $MRVL 和 $MXL，用于代工厂的 $TSEM。 $300394.SZ / TFC Optical（OSAT/组件） 如果您不是合格投资者，通常可以通过公开股票参与私人增长。因为光学播放器看起来非常相互关联。
